name: io.github.lufemc/kaval
title: Kaval
description: The freshness gate for AI agents — pre-action currentness checks that verify a belief is still true against the live world before you act. A thin MCP client over the hosted Kaval API (bring your own key).

environmentVariables.name: KAVAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bring-your-own Kaval bearer key (kv_live_…). Create one at https://usekaval.com.
